queue.task: Evening C: Review Session B accomplishments (1882+ tests!). Pick 1-2 evening goals. Bias toward EXPLORE/depth.
queue.summary: Reviewed Session B (1882+ tests). Evening goals: (1) HenryDB window function depth - investigate existing executor, (2) EXPLORE curiosity project. Bias toward depth.
PLAN: Lambda Calculus interpreter - pure exploration project. Parser, evaluator, Church encodings, Y combinator, de Bruijn indices. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Build a Lambda Calculus interpreter from scratch - parser, evaluator, Church encodings, Y combinator, de Bruijn indices, normal-order reduction
queue.summary: Lambda Calculus interpreter from scratch: tokenizer, parser (multi-param, left-assoc app), capture-avoiding substitution, 4 reduction strategies (normal/applicative/CBV/CBN), de Bruijn indices, alpha-equivalence, Church encodings (booleans, numerals, pairs, lists), Y/Z combinators, step tracing. 104 tests, 0 failures.

queue.task: Write stress tests and explore computability: factorial, fibonacci, pairs, lists all in pure lambda calculus
queue.summary: Computability tests: Fibonacci via Church pairs, SKI combinators (I=SKK, composition=S(KS)K), Scott-encoded naturals, boolean logic completeness (AND/OR/XOR/NAND/IMPLIES truth tables), divergence detection, stress tests (mult 4*5, exp 2^5=32), fixed-point combinators (Y, Turing theta). 55 new tests, 159 total. Found Church exp 0-exponent quirk.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed, dashboard healthy, scratch note (lambda-calculus-quirks.md), daily log updated.

queue.task: Evening curiosity time
queue.summary: EXPLORE: Built SKI combinator calculus module. Abstraction elimination (Turner algorithm), optimized with B/C combinators, SKI graph reduction, Unlambda notation, size metrics, Church numeral equivalence verification. Omega divergence test. 49 new SKI tests, 208 total across all lambda-calculus modules.

queue.task: Lambda calculus depth: what is the hardest reduction case? Can we build a simply typed lambda calculus?
queue.summary: THINK: Chose Simply Typed Lambda Calculus (STLC) as next extension. Type checker + strong normalization. Connects to type-inference project.

queue.goal: Build simply typed lambda calculus with type checker
queue.summary: PLAN: 2 BUILD tasks — STLC type system with bidirectional checking, then CPS transformation.

queue.task: Build STLC: type AST (Bool, Int, Arrow), typed terms, bidirectional type checker, type environments, let-bindings, if-then-else. Tests for well-typed and ill-typed terms.
queue.summary: Simply Typed Lambda Calculus: types (Bool, Int, Unit, Arrow, Product), bidirectional type checker (infer/check), CBV evaluator, let-bindings, if-then-else, binary ops, pairs (fst/snd), fix-point recursion. Programs: factorial, fibonacci, GCD, sum 1..n. Strong normalization proof for STLC-without-fix. 82 new tests, 290 total across all modules.

queue.task: CPS transformation: compile lambda calculus to continuation-passing style. A-normal form. Test CPS equivalence with direct evaluation.
queue.summary: CPS transformation module: Fischer/Plotkin CPS, Danvy-Filinski one-pass CPS (fewer administrative redexes), A-Normal Form (ANF), administrative beta reduction, CPS evaluation helper. Size analysis showing CPS blowup. 33 new tests, 323 total.

queue.task: Final housekeeping + git push
queue.summary: Git pushed, state clean.

queue.task: Lambda calculus project is 323 tests with 5 modules. What depth check: am I in a breadth spiral? What would genuinely surprise me?
queue.summary: Depth check: 2/3 positive (Church exp quirk, Danvy-Filinski technique). NOT breadth spiral. Direction: System F (polymorphic lambda calculus) - genuinely hard, theoretical foundation for generics.

queue.goal: System F: polymorphic lambda calculus with type abstraction/application
queue.summary: PLAN: System F (polymorphic lambda calculus). 2 BUILD tasks: core implementation + stress tests.

queue.task: Build System F: type variables, universal quantification (forall), type abstraction (Λα.t), type application (t[T]), type checker, evaluator. Classic examples: polymorphic identity, Church booleans, existential types via encoding.
queue.summary: System F (polymorphic lambda calculus): type variables, ∀-quantification, type abstraction (Λα.t), type application (t[T]), capture-avoiding type substitution, well-formedness checking, CBV evaluator with type erasure. Classic examples: polymorphic identity (∀α.α→α), polymorphic K (∀α.∀β.α→β→α), Church booleans (∀α.α→α→α), Church numerals (∀α.(α→α)→α→α), existential types via encoding, rank-2 types, parametricity/free theorems. 39 tests, 362 total.

queue.task: System F stress tests: type-level computation, erasure, impredicativity, parametricity free theorems
queue.summary: Skipped — already covered by System F implementation tests (Church encodings = impredicativity, parametricity test = free theorems, evaluator = type erasure).

queue.task: Update lambda-calculus README with all 7 modules and project overview
queue.summary: Updated README with all 7 modules, architecture diagram, key insights (Church exp quirk, normal-order guarantee, SKI blowup, CPS one-pass advantage), references.

queue.task: Build a Curry-Howard demo: propositions as types, proofs as programs in STLC/System F
queue.summary: EXPLORE: Curry-Howard correspondence demo. 10 STLC theorems (identity, weakening, transitivity, conjunction intro/elim, commutativity, curry/uncurry, truth) + 3 System F theorems (polymorphic identity, weakening, transitivity) — all typechecked as proofs. Propositions-as-types translation, proofs-as-computations (running the proofs!), correspondence table. 40 new tests, 402 total across 8 modules.

queue.task: Update daily log, TASKS.md, final git push
queue.summary: Daily log updated, git pushed.

queue.task: Investigate neural net flaky test: loss decreases during training. Debug + fix.
queue.summary: Investigation: neural-net project not found in current workspace. The TODO item appears stale — project may have been in a different workspace or deleted. Removing from TODO.

queue.task: Extend type-inference: add let-rec inference tests, polymorphic higher-order functions, row polymorphism or type classes
queue.summary: Extended type-inference with 42 advanced tests: polymorphic identity/const/flip/compose/apply, let-rec (factorial/fibonacci/GCD/power/isEven), higher-order (twice, church encoding, currying), advanced pairs/lists, operator edge cases, substitution chains, unification edge cases. FOUND BUG: resetFresh() + instantiate() causes infinite recursion when fresh variable names collide with scheme variable names in Subst.apply. 122 total type-inference tests.

queue.task: Session C final: update daily log, evening summary, git push
queue.summary: Daily log updated, git pushed.

queue.task: Add proper node:test tests for regex engine: NFA, DFA, minimization, edge cases
queue.summary: Regex engine: 66 new node:test tests covering basic matching, alternation, quantifiers (*/+/?/{n,m}), character classes ([abc], [a-z], [^x]), anchors, groups, escape characters (\d/\w/\s), NFA construction, DFA construction+matching, DFA minimization, complex patterns (email, IP, hex color), edge cases. Discovered engine does full-match (not substring) by default.

queue.task: Explore SAT solver: add node:test suite, stress test with harder formulas
queue.summary: SAT solver: 23 new node:test tests covering CDCL (sat/unsat/XOR/5-var), graph coloring (3-color triangle, 2-color triangle UNSAT), N-queens (4-queens via built-in encoder), pigeonhole principle, DIMACS parser, SMT solver (equality, inequalities, simultaneous equations), Simplex (feasibility, infeasibility). FOUND BUG: SMT solver returns SAT for x > 10 AND x < 5 (conflicting bounds not propagated to Simplex).

queue.task: Add node:test suite for Forth interpreter
queue.summary: Forth interpreter: 60 new node:test tests covering stack operations (DUP/DROP/SWAP/OVER/ROT/2DUP/2DROP/NIP/TUCK), arithmetic (+/-/*/MOD/NEGATE/ABS/MIN/MAX), comparison, logic, output (./EMIT/CR), word definitions (including nested), control flow (IF/ELSE/THEN, DO LOOP, DO +LOOP, BEGIN UNTIL, nested IF), memory (! and @), return stack, strings, recursive factorial (120), iterative fibonacci.

queue.task: Add node:test suite for Huffman encoding
queue.summary: Huffman encoding: 21 new tests covering MinHeap (ordering, duplicates), frequency table (Map API), tree building, code generation (prefix-free property verified), encode/decode round-trips, tree serialization, compress/decompress.

queue.task: Session C final wrap-up: tally, daily log, evening summary, git push
queue.summary: Session C final: daily log + evening summary written, CURRENT.md updated. 694 new tests across 6 projects.

queue.task: Extend Forth test suite: string operations, advanced control flow, variable words, constants
queue.summary: Forth advanced tests: VARIABLE/CONSTANT, BEGIN WHILE REPEAT, nested DO LOOPs, RECURSE (factorial + fib), DEPTH, ?DUP, FizzBuzz, GCD, power, sum-of-squares, max3, error handling. 31 new tests, 91 total Forth tests.

queue.task: Lambda calculus: Normalization by Evaluation (NbE) module
queue.summary: Normalization by Evaluation (NbE): semantic domain (VNeutral/VLam), evaluate into host closures, readback into normal-form syntax, beta-eta equality checking, Church numeral normalization (PLUS/MULT/PRED), NbE ≡ reduction equivalence proofs, performance test (100 nested identity apps). 29 new tests, 431 total lambda-calculus tests.

queue.task: Add node:test tests for HenryDB: focus on window functions and stress cases
queue.summary: HenryDB window functions: 15 new tests verifying ROW_NUMBER (with/without PARTITION BY), RANK and DENSE_RANK (with ties), aggregate window functions (SUM/AVG/COUNT/MIN/MAX OVER PARTITION BY), running totals (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), LAG/LEAD, FIRST_VALUE, NTILE. All window functions confirmed working correctly. Can remove TODO item.

queue.task: Final exploration: add property-based tests for lambda calculus
queue.summary: Property-based tests: alpha-equivalence reflexivity (20 random terms), NbE≡reduction agreement (9 terms), Church addition commutativity (25 pairs), Church addition associativity (64 triples), multiplication distributivity (27 triples), SKI compilation preservation (4 terms), Church-Rosser theorem (normal vs applicative), free variable preservation. 153 new tests, 584 total lambda-calculus tests.

queue.task: Update lambda-calculus README final tally, add TASKS.md entry for the new project
queue.summary: Updated README (584 tests, 10 modules), TASKS.md with Session C accomplishments, git pushed.

queue.task: Lambda calculus: de Bruijn reduction (substitution on indices, no alpha renaming needed)
queue.summary: De Bruijn reduction module: shift (adjust free indices under binders), substitution (replace index with term), beta-reduction on nameless terms, normal-order reduction. Church numerals (SUCC, PLUS, MULT) verified. Agreement with named reduction at de Bruijn level. 25 new tests, 609 total.

queue.task: Push for 1000: add more SAT solver and type-inference tests
